text:
On a quiet Sunday morning, Fred woke up feeling unusually brave. He decided to repair the garden gnome he'd accidentally knocked over weeks ago. Fred had learned some woodworking from an old friend who ran a hardware store. The gnome seemed okay at first glance, but Fred sensed something was wrong.

He carefully took off the gnome's hat. There were little holes... tiny little holes everywhere! Puzzled, Fred looked closer. Tiny bees had gathered inside, cozying up to their new home. Fred smiled; it was just nature playing its prank. He fixed the gnome, complete with an extra hat just for looks.

After returning inside, Fred noticed something peculiar. Every time he chuckled, the birds chimed in! It sounded silly, maybe, but Fred loved that. He laughed every day now; it seemed even birds could share his passion.
